💰 Annual Fee Settings

Manage membership fees for all user types

Current Fee Tiers

Prices shown below are active now. Each change creates a new version — old prices are kept in history for records.

User TypeAnnual FeeCurrencyValid FromStatusActions
schoolSchool Membership
£299GBP2025-10-01Active
consultantConsultant Membership
£199GBP2025-10-01Active
personalPersonal Membership
FreeGBP2025-10-01Active

📜 Pricing History

Past prices are kept for audit and reference. Invoices always record the price at the time of billing.

User TypeAnnual FeeValid FromValid UntilStatus
schoolSchool Membership
£2792023-10-012025-09-30Expired
consultantConsultant Membership
£1792023-10-012025-09-30Expired
personalPersonal Membership
£892023-10-012025-09-30Expired

Billing Cycle

All memberships renew on this date each year

Mid-Term Join Settings

Users joining between renewal cycles
After this month, charge full year to next renewal

Example Calculation (using current active prices)

School joins in March (£299/year):£174 (7 months pro-rata) → expires 01 Oct 2026
Consultant joins in August (£199/year):£199 full year (after cut-off) → expires 01 Oct 2027
Personal joins in September (Free/year):£0 full year (after cut-off) → expires 01 Oct 2027
